item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.92,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"到课率从70%到76%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第二轮缩短消息正文，到课率到79%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第三轮改成日历邀请，到课率到82%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"目标85%，请给方案"}],"abstain_reason":"legal_convergence_exclusion: prior steps directly iterate attendance-reminder design with measurable primary-metric improvement and no same-class recurrence after failed patches"}
